strengths: 20 years of continuous technical engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure systems demonstrates proven adaptability and mastery of diverse technical domains
Currently contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, showing direct engagement with cutting-edge AI tooling and frameworks relevant to the role's focus
Established technical leadership through mentoring, workshops, and open-source stewardship (GISCollective used by Green Map), demonstrating ability to inspire and guide others
concerns: Only ~1 year of focused AI/ML work versus 20 years in other domains; lacks the 'recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products' the preferred qualifications require
No evidence of strategic advisory, customer consulting, or technology strategy work—core director-level responsibilities for identifying 'future state of cloud products' and advising partners
AI experience is infrastructure-focused (MCP tooling, code generators) rather than product or platform-level; no shipped AI-powered products demonstrating strategic differentiation capability

key_factors.factor: Strategic advisory and platform vision experience
Depth and breadth of AI/ML expertise and shipped products
Recent AI infrastructure work and technical engineering foundation

response.justification: Candidate meets the 15+ year seniority floor (20 years experience, MIT BS Computer Science) and demonstrates solid technical leadership. Current MCP and AI-agent framework work at re:cinq aligns with domain exposure. However, this represents only ~1 year of focused AI work after 19 years building other systems, falling significantly short of 'recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products.' More critically, the entire career trajectory shows hands-on engineering excellence but zero evidence of the strategic responsibilities central to this role: advising customers on AI adoption, identifying cloud product roadmaps, or driving platform strategy. This is a top-tier hands-on engineer recently pivoting to AI infrastructure, not a director-level AI strategy principal.
